steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content: The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute that input into the function.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content: Find the output at $x=0$. $$ f(0)=7(0)-\frac{1}{9}=-\frac{1}{9} $$ So the intercept is $$ (0,-\frac{1}{9}) $$ The answer is A.
